title: Mike on Monday
body:
# Mike on Monday

Denver-area band/artist remixed by alphabets (Colin Ward) on **REMIX09** (December 30, 2009). Track: "BOXOFBOOGERS [MIKE ON MONDAY]." This is track 1 — the opener of the REMIX09 collection.

## Research Gaps

- Unclear if "Mike on Monday" is a solo project or a band
- Members unknown
- No Bandcamp / SoundCloud presence confirmed yet

## Sources

- [alphabets REMIX09 — Bandcamp](https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/remix09)
